name: bandit.high_threat_low_reward_holds
description: Fixture-backed camp-map product proof: a scout-confirmed remembered lead with low bounty and high confirmed threat is evaluated through the real 30-minute live dispatch cadence. The camp must name the remembered lead and hold rather than escalating into a new stalk/scout dispatch.
artifact_patterns: hold: high threat or poor reward does not escalate by itself
camp-map dispatch lead=overmap_special:bandit_camp@140,51,0#lead:basecamp_activity:player@140,39,0@140,39,0 status=scout_confirmed bounty=1 threat=5 confidence=3 selected=hold / chill
camp-map dispatch blocked: remembered risk/reward decision held pressure

steps.label: post_load_high_threat_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the high-threat/low-reward remembered-lead fixture; this proves only startup/load and fixture footing before the cadence wait
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after load, later high-threat hold evidence cannot be credited.

steps.label: preflight_saved_high_threat_low_reward_lead
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the five-member ready roster plus low-bounty/high-threat remembered camp-map lead contract
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains a five-member ready camp and a scout-confirmed remembered lead shaped as bounty 1 / threat 5 before live cadence proof starts
steps.failure_rule: If the high-threat lead footing is missing or malformed, later hold logs cannot be credited as risk/reward product proof.

steps.label: wait_30_minutes_for_high_threat_hold_cadence
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu
artifact_state_patterns: hold: high threat or poor reward does not escalate by itself
steps.expected_visible_fact: the player waited through the real 30-minute overmap NPC cadence window; feature credit depends on same-run debug artifact lines proving the high-threat hold, not on the wait UI alone
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted or the artifact delta lacks the high-threat hold rejection, this scenario is inconclusive/red.
steps.abort_reason: guarded long wait was interrupted before the high-threat hold artifact could be captured

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_high_threat_hold
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the high-threat hold probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit cannot be opened, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as a clean saved-state proof.

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_high_threat_hold
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the high-threat hold probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit confirmation is unproven, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as fully green without reviewing cleanup status.

steps.label: audit_saved_high_threat_hold_no_dispatch
steps.abort_reason: saved bandit_live_world did not preserve the expected high-threat hold state: all members still ready at home and no active outside dispatch
steps.expected_immediate_state: after save/quit, saved bandit_live_world still has five ready at-home members and no active outside group; the high-threat lead was held rather than escalated
steps.failure_rule: If an active outside state appears or the lead footing changed unexpectedly, same-run hold logs cannot close the guardrail by themselves.

steps.label: audit_high_threat_hold_artifact
required_line_patterns: hold: high threat or poor reward does not escalate by itself
camp-map dispatch lead=overmap_special:bandit_camp@140,51,0#lead:basecamp_activity:player@140,39,0@140,39,0 status=scout_confirmed bounty=1 threat=5 confidence=3 selected=hold / chill
camp-map dispatch blocked: remembered risk/reward decision held pressure
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not show remembered-lead source, low-bounty/high-threat scoring inputs, and held pressure instead of a new dispatch
steps.failure_rule: No high-threat/low-reward guardrail credit if the artifact lacks the named hold line from the same run.

evidence_contract.claim: a high-threat/low-reward remembered camp-map lead is evaluated through the real live cadence and held rather than escalated into stalk/scout pressure
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for high-threat risk/reward hold behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No feature-proof credit if startup/load, saved preflight high-threat lead, real wait/cadence action, same-run hold artifact, save/writeback, and saved no-active-group state are not all green/matched.
